text: Being here, I feel a sense of intellectual curiosity and anticipation. The glass and metal structure of the building, the clean, minimal aesthetic, and the brightly-lit R+D exhibit suggest a space dedicated to inquiry and innovation. It feels as though ideas are made visible here—displayed, questioned, and reconfigured openly. There's an undercurrent of excitement at the convergence of technology and philosophy, paired with a quiet awareness of my own role as a contemplative observer in the process of discovery.
